Autodesk.Revit.DB Namespace

FamilyInstance Class

An instance of a family within the Revit project, such as a piece of furniture or a door.

public class FamilyInstance : Element, IDisposable
MemberDescription
SymbolGets the FamilySymbol object that represents the type of this family instance.
HostGets the element that hosts this family instance.

FamilyInstance objects are always placed based on a FamilySymbol.
